prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a416fc5b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `a416fc5b` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a416fc5b/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a416fc5b/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a416fc5b/generator.py#L70), with the hint correction documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a416fc5b/notes.md#L1). The rule is: a separator board has a fixed central `2` cross and one ring `2` cross; the normal output adds an `8` cross and a `5` cross three ring-steps away, and if both `5` and `8` are already present the output becomes a solid `7` square sized by the colored-cell count. I discarded the Opus hint because it incorrectly described only a single `2` plus; no new shared primitive was needed.

The generator stays on-family by preserving the same 3x3 separator-board structure while varying the odd row/column cell sizes, which yields enough distinct examples without changing the task logic. Verification passed `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a416fc5b/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a416fc5b/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a416fc5b/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a416fc5b/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a416fc5b/previews/preview_03.png).
